memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Inventory

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Inventory

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsInventoryConfigurationsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteInventoryConfigurationSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteInventoryConfigurationSortBy::CREATED_AT_DESC, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, FString const &InventoryConfigurationCode=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetInventoryConfigurations

briefdescription.para: Get a list of inventory configurations in a namespace.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsInventoryConfigurationsPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The sorting criteria for the list of inventory configurations. Value: createdAt, updatedAt, code, maxItems. default = createdAt:desc.
Number of content per page to retrieve. Default value : 20
Number of page to retrieve. Default value : 0
The code of a certain inventory configuration.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsInventoryTagPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteInventoryUtilitiesSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteInventoryUtilitiesSortBy::CREATED_AT_DESC, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetInventoryTags

briefdescription.para: Get a list of inventory tags in a namespace.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsInventoryTagPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The sorting criteria for the list of inventory types. Value: createdAt, name. default = createdAt:desc.
Number of content per page to retrieve. Default value : 20
Number of page to retrieve. Default value : 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserInventoriesPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteUserInventoriesSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteUserInventoriesSortBy::CREATED_AT_DESC, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, FString const &InventoryConfigurationCode=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetUserInventories

briefdescription.para: Get a list of user inventories in a namespace.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserInventoriesPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The sorting criteria for the list of user inventories. Value: createdAt, updatedAt. default = createdAt:desc.
Number of content per page to retrieve. Default value : 20
Number of page to retrieve. Default value : 0
The code of a certain inventory configuration.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsItemTypePagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteInventoryUtilitiesSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteInventoryUtilitiesSortBy::CREATED_AT_DESC, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetItemTypes

briefdescription.para: Get a list of item types in a namespace.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsItemTypePagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The sorting criteria for the list of inventory types. Value: createdAt, name. default = createdAt:desc.
Number of content per page to retrieve. Default value : 20
Number of page to retrieve. Default value : 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteUserItemsSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteUserItemsSortBy::CREATED_AT_DESC, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, FString const &SourceItemId=TEXT(""), FString const &Tags=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetUserInventoryAllItems

briefdescription.para: Get a list of user items from specific user inventory.

parameterdescription.para: The id of user's inventory.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserItemsPagingResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The sorting criteria for the list of inventory types. Value: createdAt, updatedAt, quantity. default = createdAt:desc.
Number of content per page to retrieve. Default value : 20
Number of page to retrieve. Default value : 0
The id of source item.
The Tags of user's item.
The preferred minimum quantity of an item.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, FString const &SlotId, FString const &SourceItemId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserInventoryItem

briefdescription.para: Get a specific item from specific user inventory.

parameterdescription.para: The id of user's inventory.
The id of item slot.
The id of item source.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserInventoryItemRequest > const &UpdatedItemsRequest, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserInventoryItemResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkUpdateInventoryItems

parameterdescription.para: The id of user's inventory.
An array of items that will be updated.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserInventoryItemResponse>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsDeleteUserInventoryItemsRequest > const &DeletedItemsRequest, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsDeleteUserInventoryItemResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkDeleteInventoryItems

parameterdescription.para: The id of user's inventory.
An array of items that will be deleted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<FAccelByteModelsDeleteUserInventoryItemResponse>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &TargetInventoryId, FAccelByteModelsMoveUserItemsBetweenInventoriesRequest const &MoveItemsRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMoveUserItemsBetweenInventoriesResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: MoveItemsBetweenInventories

parameterdescription.para: The target id of user's inventory.
Variable contains an array of items that will be moved as well as the inventory destination id.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsMoveUserItemsBetweenInventoriesResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, FAccelByteModelsConsumeUserItemsRequest const &ConsumedItemsRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ConsumeUserInventoryItem

parameterdescription.para: The id of user's inventory.
Variable contains an array of items that will be consumed.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Provide APIs to access Inventory service.
